title: agrostis serotina
intro: Agrostis serotina, also known as late bent or autumn bent, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Agrostis. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as urinary tract infections and joint pain. The health benefits of Agrostis serotina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Agrostis serotina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
